component.name: Bigscreen Jukebox
component.summary: A fullscreen 10-foot TV client for Music Assistant

description.p: Bigscreen Jukebox is a fullscreen, TV- and remote-friendly client for a Music Assistant server. It connects directly to your server and turns any screen into a 10-foot music experience controllable with a D-pad remote.

ul.li: Now Playing with album art, transport controls and an Up Next queue
Search your Music Assistant providers and play instantly
Karaoke lyrics with an optional LRCLIB fallback when none are provided
Audio visualizer (radial pulse, flow lines, bars), optionally behind the lyrics
Guest mode: a corner QR code lets guests add songs from their phones

description.p: This is an unofficial, third-party client and is not affiliated with the Music Assistant project.

screenshot.caption: Now Playing with album art, transport and the Up Next queue
